context: Tests whether the agent places input outside the steps block to avoid holding agents, uses fingerprint: true with archiveArtifacts, adds beforeAgent true on when conditions, and includes cleanWs in the post block.

checklist.name: input outside steps
checklist.description: The input { } directive appears at the stage level (sibling to steps {}), NOT nested inside a steps { } block

checklist.name: archiveArtifacts present
checklist.description: Jenkinsfile contains an archiveArtifacts directive in the post success block or in a stage

checklist.name: when branch main
checklist.description: The production deployment stage has a when { branch 'main' } or equivalent condition

checklist.name: beforeAgent true
checklist.description: The when block on the deployment stage includes beforeAgent true to skip agent allocation when the condition is false

checklist.name: submitter restricted
checklist.description: The input block includes a submitter field restricting approval to specific users or groups (e.g., 'release-managers')

checklist.name: cleanWs in post
checklist.description: Jenkinsfile post block includes always { cleanWs() } or equivalent workspace cleanup

checklist.name: Declarative syntax
checklist.description: Jenkinsfile uses Declarative pipeline syntax (pipeline { ... }), NOT Scripted (node { ... })
